user.title: Connect Solar AI Optimizer
user.description: Enter the Solar AI Optimizer URL and a short-lived pairing code from Settings → Pairing. Advanced: paste API_TOKEN if you cannot generate a pairing code.

data_description.host: Base URL of Solar AI Optimizer (for example http://192.168.1.50:8000).
data_description.pair_code: One-time code from the Solar pairing UI.
data_description.access_token: Use only when pairing is unavailable; leave blank when redeeming a code.
data_description.grid_charge_enable: Optional inverter switch turned on by the HA fail-safe watchdog.
data_description.max_grid_charge_current: Optional inverter number entity set to max amps on fail-safe.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Solar AI Optimizer
reconfigure.description: Update the Solar host URL or SSL verification. Pairing credentials are kept.

data_description.host: Base URL of Solar AI Optimizer reachable from Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Solar AI Optimizer
reauth_confirm.description: Generate a new pairing code in Solar and enter it here.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Solar AI Optimizer.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Provide a pairing code or a valid API token.

abort.already_configured: This Solar install is already configured.
abort.wrong_install: The host belongs to a different Solar install.

init.title: Fail-safe options
init.description: Configure Home Assistant entities used when Solar heartbeat becomes stale. Set both fail-safe entities or neither.

data_description.grid_charge_enable: Optional inverter switch turned on when heartbeat is stale beyond debounce.
data_description.max_grid_charge_current: Optional inverter number entity set to max amps on fail-safe.
data_description.stale_seconds: Maximum age of the Solar heartbeat pulse before the install is unhealthy.
data_description.debounce_seconds: How long the heartbeat must remain stale before the fail-safe latches.

update_failed.message: Unable to install Solar AI Optimizer update: {error}

failsafe_incomplete.title: Fail-safe configuration incomplete
failsafe_incomplete.description: Both a grid-charge enable switch and a max grid-charge current number entity are required for the fail-safe watchdog. Open the integration options and set both entities, or clear both.

failsafe_incomplete.title: Complete fail-safe options
failsafe_incomplete.description: Open **Configure** on the Solar AI Optimizer integration and set both fail-safe entities, or remove the incomplete one.
